## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run minify`
- [ ] `npm run docs`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Documentation and types are updated when contracts changed
- [ ] The change contains no demo HTML or unrelated generated assets
